description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a combination of dark and natural wood exterior finishes, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The front facade is defined by large glass windows and a wooden deck with steps leading up to the entrance. The side view reveals a spacious outdoor terrace with wooden flooring and a staircase, as well as a minimalist wall with few windows. The rear of the bungalow showcases a mix of wood paneling and glass, with a partially enclosed outdoor area. The interior is visible through the large windows, showing open-plan living spaces and modern furnishings. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, wood paneling, and a spacious outdoor terrace. The design features clean lines and a strong indoor-outdoor connection.
description_view_0: Front view with large glass windows, a wooden deck, and the main entrance steps.
description_view_1: Side view showing a long wooden terrace, exterior staircase, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with wood paneling, glass sections, and a partially enclosed outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with dark exterior walls, a staircase, and limited window exposure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
